notes: Current trace-bounded responsibility for Instance extension property. No authority, ownership, effect, witness, or source activation is implied beyond the exact current references.
Instance-side structured names use ExtensionFunctionDecl, AsyncExtensionFunctionDecl, and MessageSuffix; qualified extension selection remains `::`.
Design/conformance seed only; integrated checker remains NOT_RUN and handoff is not implementation-complete.
Non-current trace identity retained for reference integrity; it has no source activation or independent semantics.

Inside interpolated-string mode, `$root`, `$root.member`, `$root.1`, and `$root[index]` form one contiguous read-only path. Calls and general expressions require `${...}`; an unescaped terminal backtick is a CST-only boundary.

display_name: Layout newline separator for labeled aggregate entries
notes: Parser-context virtual separator only inside direct labeled aggregate bodies; not global ASI. Current contract treats this Stable design law as requiring grammar-conformance capsule evidence before parser handoff.
Stable: single-expression lambdas may return implicitly; block lambdas require ret, and return is not allowed inside lambdas.
Explicit lambdas use `{ x: T, y: U => body }`; lambda parameters do not reuse ordinary context/witness/rest parameter forms.
Law bodies contain only pure predicate assertions optionally introduced by requires, ensures, or invariant. General statements, mutation, I/O, await, spawn and arbitrary execution are forbidden.
Current tooling/evidence profile for law-check agents. It grants no ordinary source activation and must cite current machine authorities.

authority: LANGUAGE / LEXER / PARSER / TYPE_SYSTEM / CHECKER / RUNTIME
notes: Stable `let#lazy` pure call-by-need binding with deterministic cycle/reentrancy rejection, concurrent single commit and exactly-once memoized cleanup. `let@lazy` is recovery-only. Product implementation NOT_RUN.
&& and || are not logical short-circuit operators in Deeplus; use and then/otherwise or strict and/or.
NameEnv, ActivationEnv, and WitnessVisibilityEnv are distinct frames. Candidate sets use set semantics and deterministic ambiguity rejection; source order and nesting depth are not priorities.

The integrated Grammar lexical profile and Frontend Model are the official design authority for token modes, attached delimiters, prefix literals, selectors, interpolation, numeric candidates and layout boundaries. Product lexer and formatter are NOT_RUN.

display_name: Library static binding initializer minimum sound profile
notes: A library top-level binding is admitted only when it is an immutable `let`, its dependency graph is acyclic, it commits exactly once, its normalized error/effect/authority rows are empty, it never suspends, acquires or escapes no resource, creates no task or actor, and remains locally isolated.
A line comment starts with // and extends to the end of the physical line, unless a more specific comment opener such as //! or //- has already been recognized.

display_name: Complex inner product law for NumericArray dot product
notes: Current contract: Conjugating complex inner-product convention is specified as current law for complex Rep; product checker NOT_RUN.
`**` and `*+` share the LinearProductExpr tier, associate left, and type-check every intermediate rank/shape. Mixing them is not itself an associativity error.

@if, @try, and @scope admit either exactly one expression or a block whose every reachable normal path produces a value through local ret. return transfers from the enclosing named function; finally never produces the local value.

A loop and its optional outcome match normalize to one LoopWithOutcomeHandler node. Only the final break target handler observes ::break; intermediate cleanup runs but intermediate handlers do not.
